edgeCases: Never clobbers canonical roadmap.json: WriteDraft refuses roadmap.RoadmapFile with an actionable error; verified hash unchanged across runs
Empty/doc-only inventory: zero targets -> empty (non-nil) Baseline phase, nil gap phases, 0/0 summary, valid non-malformed draft
Missing inventory: analyze.ErrNoInventory wrapped with 'run centinela analyze first'; exit 1; no draft file written
Byte-stable re-run: pure assembly over reconstruct's sorted Targets + caller goal order; verified diff-identical across two runs
Baseline exempt from status/coverage/readiness via single shared isNonSchedulablePhase predicate (Backlog || Baseline)
No-gaps case: TODO-free targets + no goals -> nil gap phases; summary emits 'supply --goal' hint
Atomic draft write: temp file + rename so a failure leaves no partial draft
